warnings: Counterfactual narratives are reconstructed from artifact evidence only. Where evidence is absent, the reconstruction stays unknown.
MET never invents history or fills missing steps. REP retains replay authority.
failure_prevented: Postmortem narratives being told from memory rather than artifact evidence — leading to invented earlier-intervention claims.
signal_improved: Each top failure carries an explicit what_happened, what_should_have_happened, earlier_intervention_point, and evidence_refs — with unknowns visible.

counterfactual_entries.related_failure: Long-horizon replay coverage gap remained partial across multiple dashboard cycles.
counterfactual_entries.what_happened: EVL coverage signal partial; REP per-dimension status absent; MET surfaced gap but no bounded slice was admitted.
counterfactual_entries.what_should_have_happened: REP per-dimension status field would have been present, EVL coverage would have referenced it, and the gap would have closed via a bounded slice through AEX/PQX/CDE.
counterfactual_entries.earlier_intervention_point: When MET first emitted EVC-EVL-LONG-HORIZON-REPLAY, an AEX-admitted PQX slice could have closed the gap before staleness accumulated.
counterfactual_entries.next_recommended_input: Pair the candidate with a REP per-dimension artifact and a slice candidate; refresh after-state evidence.

counterfactual_entries.related_failure: Fallback rows persisting without GOV-side reduction evidence.
counterfactual_entries.what_happened: MET surfaced fallback pressure; no canonical GOV artifact retrieval observed; POL-GOV-FALLBACK-REDUCTION drifted toward stale.
counterfactual_entries.what_should_have_happened: GOV-owned fallback row registry would have been retrieved and paired with LIN per-edge lineage.
counterfactual_entries.earlier_intervention_point: First MET stale signal at age = stale_after_days // 2 should have triggered owner-evidence retrieval.
counterfactual_entries.next_recommended_input: Retrieve canonical GOV fallback row registry and pair with LIN per-edge lineage.

counterfactual_entries.related_failure: CDE override audit gap with no evidence references.
counterfactual_entries.what_happened: Override evidence intake was empty; signal remained unknown.
counterfactual_entries.next_recommended_input: Intake CDE-owned override audit log evidence before reconstructing.
